Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class KnowledgeCaseSettings

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.KnowledgeCaseSettings
public class KnowledgeCaseSettings extends Object

Java class for KnowledgeCaseSettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="KnowledgeCaseSettings">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="articlePDFCreationProfile" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="articlePublicSharingCommunities" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}KnowledgeCommunitiesSettings" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="articlePublicSharingSites" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}KnowledgeSitesSettings" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="articlePublicSharingSitesChatterAnswers" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}KnowledgeSitesSettings" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="assignTo" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="customizationClass" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="defaultContributionArticleType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="editor" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}KnowledgeCaseEditor" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableArticleCreation" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableArticlePublicSharingSites" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableCaseDataCategoryMapping" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="useProfileForPDFCreation" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
